content.description: Markdown or text content for the next version.

content_base64.description: Base64-encoded binary content for the next version, used by adapters such as slack_file.

content_type.description: MIME type for content_base64 or source-backed edits.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to merge into the artifact registry record.

source_artifact_id.description: Existing run artifact id to use as the next version content source.

source_storage_path.description: Existing run artifact storage_path to use as the next version content source.
